addons.name: Schematic Sync
addons.author: PrismLauncher +
addons.description: Keeps the schematics folder in sync across all instances.
addons.longDescription: Mirrors the schematics folder across all of your instances, so a schematic saved while playing one version is available in every other. The newest copy of each file always wins. Works with Litematica, WorldEdit and structure NBT files, and adds a settings page.
